news-global-econ.title: California advocates insist on raising minimum wage to $30 despite research showing 'negative outcomes'
news-global-econ.description: A $30 minimum wage ballot initiative is being pushed in Oakland and Alameda County by One Fair Wage, despite studies linking past California wage hikes to job losses.

news-global-econ.title: Trump's Migration Rules Force Wage Gains in Meatpacking
news-global-econ.description:
President Donald Trump's migration cutoff is pressuring a huge meatpacking firm to offer better wages to President Joe Biden's last wave of low-wage migrants.
The post Trump’s Migration Rules Force Wage Gains in Meatpacking appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Democrat swing candidate called Biden's border handling 'a huge misstep' after backing his approach as mayor
news-global-econ.description: Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti, a Democratic House candidate, faced questions over her shift on Biden's southern border policies in a battleground House race.

news-global-econ.title: Trump's 'whole civilization will die tonight' Iran threat polarizes social media
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump polarized social media with a Truth Social post that an entire "civilization will die tonight" while threatening a devastating U.S. attack against Iran.

news-global-soc.title: Biden wanted to drive reliable energy 'into a ditch,' says Trump Energy Secretary
news-global-soc.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright claimed Tuesday that the Biden administration was driving the U.S. energy system "into a ditch" through massive subsidies.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian athletes respond to Trump's warning that 'a whole civilization will die tonight'
news-global-soc.description: Iranian athletes reacted to Trump's threat against Iran as tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz deadline and potential strikes on infrastructure.

news-global-soc.title: Second choke point crisis looms as Houthis threaten key Red Sea shipping lane
news-global-soc.description: Iran-backed Houthi forces threaten to target Red Sea shipping, raising the prospect of a second global chokepoint amid the conflict with Iran.
